column1: # OWASP ZAP rule tuning for ClutterStock.
# Start permissive — every rule WARNs by default. After the first few clean
# baseline runs, suppress known-false-positives here (e.g. cookie-without-
# secure on localhost-only test stack, missing-CSP-meta if the app sets CSP
# Rule IDs come from the ZAP scan output (numeric, e.g. 10038, 10202).
